message:
feat(tui): add search result density sparkline, fix focus gating, and prevent thread list text wrapping

Enhances the search cockpit with a match-density sparkline and active
result summary row above the result list, providing at-a-glance visual
feedback on where matches concentrate across results. Also fixes a focus
gating issue and prevents unintended text wrapping in thread views.

- Add match-density sparkline above search results showing per-row match
  count distribution (up to 80 rows) using ftui_extras Sparkline widget
- Add active result summary line showing cursor position, row matches,
  total matches, and visible row count
- Fix preview panel scroll gating: change condition from
  !matches!(Focus::QueryBar) to matches!(Focus::ResultList) so preview
  only scrolls when result list is explicitly focused
- Set WrapMode::None on thread list paragraph to prevent long thread
  subjects from wrapping and breaking the column layout
- Set WrapMode::None on thread detail message tree to prevent reply
  chain indentation from causing unintended line breaks
- Fix minor whitespace in empty thread list placeholder text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
